task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NextGen Connect (Mirth Connect) Administrator, a channel named 'ADT_Message_Relay' is visible in the Channels list or Dashboard.

task_completion.description: Source is configured to receive TCP/MLLP on port 6661.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Source tab for the channel, Connector Type is set to 'TCP Listener', and Local Port is set to '6661'.

task_completion.description: Destination is configured to forward via TCP/MLLP to localhost:6665.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Destinations tab, Connector Type is set to 'TCP Sender', Remote Address is 'localhost' (or '127.0.0.1'), and Remote Port is '6665'.

task_completion.description: Destination queuing is configured with specified parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Destinations tab, 'Queue Messages' is set to 'Always'. 'Retry Interval (ms)' is '10000', 'Max Retry Count' is '5', and the 'Rotate Queue' checkbox is checked.

task_completion.description: Channel is deployed and the sample message is sent to the source port.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Dashboard shows the 'ADT_Message_Relay' channel as Deployed/Started with message counts > 0 (Received/Sent), OR a terminal window shows a command sending the file to port 6661 (e.g., `nc localhost 6661 < /home/ga/test_adt_a01.hl7`), OR the Mirth 'Send Message' dialog is used with the HL7 file contents.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI to configure the channel.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Mirth Connect Administrator Java application tabs (Source, Destinations, etc.) rather than just writing a script.

integrity.description: The test message was sent using a real tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a terminal command (like nc or telnet) or the built-in Mirth 'Send Message' feature to send the HL7 message, rather than just opening the file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing XML configuration files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps are performed in the GUI, not by pasting pre-made XML channel exports into a terminal or file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task configures a NextGen Connect (Mirth Connect) channel named 'ADT_Message_Relay'. Source: TCP Listener on port 6661. Destination: TCP Sender to localhost:6665. Queue settings: Queue Messages = Always, Retry Interval = 10000ms, Max Retry Count = 5, Rotate Queue = checked. Test message is an HL7 ADT_A01 message located at /home/ga/test_adt_a01.hl7.
